positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for colorectal_conclusion_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u33,negated_conjecture,
    bile_duct_cancer(colorectal_c)).

cnf(u38,negated_conjecture,
    ~mild_flu(colorectal_c)).

cnf(u43,axiom,
    ~low_survival_rate(colorectal_c)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~cholangiocarcinoma(X0) | bile_duct_cancer(X0)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    low_survival_rate(mild_flu_c)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~severe_cancer(X0) | deadly_disease(X0)).

cnf(u45,axiom,
    deadly_disease(bdc)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~deadly_disease(X0) | low_survival_rate(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    bile_duct_cancer(bdc)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    severe_cancer(bdc)).

cnf(u46,axiom,
    low_survival_rate(bdc)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    mild_flu(mild_flu_c)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for colorectal_conclusion_negative
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u30,axiom,
    ~low_survival_rate(colorectal_c)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~deadly_disease(X0) | low_survival_rate(X0)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    bile_duct_cancer(bdc)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    severe_cancer(bdc)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    low_survival_rate(mild_flu_c)).

cnf(u37,axiom,
    low_survival_rate(bdc)).

cnf(u36,axiom,
    deadly_disease(bdc)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~severe_cancer(X0) | deadly_disease(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,

for all inputs,
